title: Projects
text:
Compare binary classification machine learning methods




Logistic Regression
Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA)
Quadratic Discriminant Analysis (QDA)




Type of chest pain, number of major vessels, and blood disorder were found to be the potential risk factors that could cause heart disease and the algorithm with the lowest test error rate after 5-fold cross validation was Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA).



Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Matplotlib
View on GitHub

title: About
text:
I am a biostatistics researcher interested in healthcare analytics, epidemiology, and predictive modeling.
My work focuses on applying statistical and machine learning methods to improve healthcare outcomes and public health decision-making.



Healthcare Data Science
Epidemiology
Machine Learning
Statistical Modeling
Public Health Analytics




I aim to contribute to impactful healthcare research by combining statistics, machine learning, and real-world data analysis.
